parameters.architecture: GQA (8 KV heads x 128 head_dim = 1024 KV dim), 36 layers, hidden_size=4096
parameters.note: Pivoted from Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct (gated) to Qwen3-8B-Base (size scaling)

key_finding: REPLICATES: Qwen3-8B-Base V|nums positive 20/20 bins BOTH layers. L27 p=0.013 (SIGNIFICANT), peak V|nums=0.478. L18 p=0.083 (marginal), peak V|nums=0.488. Nearly identical to 4B (peak 0.497, p=0.01). Forward-looking channel is SIZE-INDEPENDENT within Qwen. Unexpected: nums_R=0.42 on 8B vs 0.26 on 4B despite similar accuracy (90% vs 88%).
evidence_impact: Phase 2 natural_usage STRONG (reinforced). Position-sweep confirmed on 2 families + 2 sizes. Size-independence established as new finding. 4-model comparison figure now available.
next_planned: Address nums_R asymmetry (8B vs 4B). Or Llama position-sweep if token available. Or accuracy-matched confound control.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: STRONG: Position-sweep V|nums on 2 families (Qwen p=0.01; Phi p=0.003) + size scaling (Qwen-8B p=0.013). Mistral WEAK/MARGINAL (p=0.14). Size-independent within Qwen. Per-operation V|nums on 2 families. WRRA on 2 families. Paraphrase NULL for non-number tokens.

cross_model_replication.status: STRONG: Phase 1 complete (4 families). Phase 2: position-sweep STRONG on 2 families (Qwen+Phi) + 2 sizes (4B+8B), WEAK on Mistral. Per-operation probing on 2 families, WRRA on 2 families. Size-independence established.
